ИНСТ-SEA
ORGA Astro Migration — PullQuote Test

АНАЛИЗ
ИНСТ-CHE
Infrastructure Foundation Pipeline Active

Test 1: Basic PullQuote (Center Aligned)

Testing basic PullQuote component with center alignment and attribution. Validates: slot handling, CSS scoping, Hugo compatibility.

Test 2: Enhanced PullQuote (Left Aligned)

Testing enhanced styling with left alignment. Validates: CSS variable system, responsive design, accessibility.

Test 3: Right-Aligned PullQuote

Testing right alignment without attribution. Validates: conditional rendering, alignment system.

Test 4: i18n Integration Test

Testing internationalization system integration. Current language: en

i18n Function Tests:

  • UI Copy: "Copy" | "Loading..."
  • Investigation: "High Confidence"
  • Audio: "Play" | "Pause"

Test 5: CSS Variable System Validation

Validating CSS variable system integration across components.

Primary Accent Color
Secondary Accent Color
Success Status Color
Warning Status Color

Test 6: Icon System Integration

Testing icon component integration with Hugo Blowfish compatibility.
